zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Anthony Greneway於大約1547年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德時，他的父親Richard Greneway31歲，母親Joan Tylney29歲。他於1565年10月12日與Lady Winifred Harcourt在英國巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1619年1月26日在他的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Anthony Greneway于大约1547年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德时，他的父亲Richard Greneway31岁，母亲Joan Tylney29岁。他于1565年10月12日与Lady Winifred Harcourt在英国巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1619年1月26日在他的家乡享年73岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Greneway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Staffordshire): topographic name for someone who lived by a grassy path, from Middle English grene, grein ‘green’ + weye ‘path’ (see Way ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Dutch Groeneweg or German Grüneweg, Gröneweg, topographic names with the same meaning as 1 above.

variants.name: Way
meanings: English (mainly southern): topographic name for someone who lived near a road or path, from Middle English wei (Old English weg, cognate with Old Norse vegr, Old High German weg), or a habitational name from some minor place called with this word, as for example any of the places called Way or Waye in Devon or Way in Somerset and Kent.

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Anthony Greneway was born about 1547, in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Richard Greneway, was 31 and his mother, Joan Tylney, was 29. He married Lady Winifred Harcourt on 12 October 1565, in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 26 January 1619, in his hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Anthony Greneway est né environ 1547, à Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Greneway, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Tylney, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Winifred Harcourt le 12 octobre 1565, à Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 janvier 1619, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Anthony Greneway um 1547 in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Greneway 31 und seine Mutter Joan Tylney 29. Er hat am 12. Oktober 1565 in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England Lady Winifred Harcourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. Januar 1619 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Anthony Greneway è nato il circa 1547 nel Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Greneway, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Tylney, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Winifred Harcourt il 12 ottobre 1565, nel Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 26 gennaio 1619, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Anthony Grenewayが約1547年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアレックハンプステアドで生まれた時，父Richard Grenewayは31歳，母Joan Tylneyは29歳であった。1565年10月12日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアレックハンプステアドでLady Winifred Harcourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1619年1月26日に故郷で73歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアレックハンプステアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Anthony Greneway(이)가 대략 1547년 영국 벅잉함실르 렉함프스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Greneway(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Tylney(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1565년 10월 12일 영국 벅잉함실르 렉함프스테아드에서 Lady Winifred Harcourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1619년 1월 26일 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 렉함프스테아드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Anthony Greneway nasceu aproximadamente 1547, em Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Greneway, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Tylney, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Winifred Harcourt em 12 de outubro de 1565, em Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1619, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Anthony Greneway родился около 1547 г. в местности леккхампстид, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Greneway было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Tylney, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Winifred Harcourt 12 октября 1565 г. в местности леккхампстид, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 26 января 1619 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности леккхампстид, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Anthony Greneway nació aproximadamente 1547, en Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Greneway, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Tylney, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Winifred Harcourt el 12 de octubre de 1565, en Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 26 de enero de 1619, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
